description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a fenced yard, surrounded by numerous mature trees and lush landscaping. The structure features a prominent hip roof with a reddish-brown hue, complemented by several attached sections with flat and gabled roofs, including a glass-roofed sunroom or greenhouse. The property includes a kidney-shaped swimming pool, a wooden deck, and a paved pathway leading to the main entrance. The front yard is landscaped with grass, shrubs, and flowerbeds, while the backyard offers additional green space and outdoor amenities. Large windows and multiple doors are visible, providing ample natural light and access to the outdoors.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, glass sunroom, landscaped yard, and a swimming pool, surrounded by trees and a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, glass sunroom, wooden deck, and lush landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the hip roof, backyard greenery, and the back entrance with more trees.
description_view_2: Side view featuring the swimming pool, circular patio, and the glass-roofed sunroom adjacent to the main building.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the main gate, pathway, flowerbeds, and a clear view of the bungalow's various roof types.
attribute_roof_type: hip with attached gable and flat sections
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on multiple facades
